problem id: a69f387a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  00111000 -> 01110000
  10001110 -> 00011101
  01010111 -> 10101110
  01011100 -> 10111000
  00101100 -> 01011000
  01000000 -> 10000000
  01100101 -> 11001010
  01111011 -> 11110110
  10000111 -> 00001111

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 01010011
